taxonomy: Palala glabra is classified within the family Fabaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as legumes. Further classification of Palala glabra includes its placement in the subfamily Faboideae and the tribe Dalbergieae. This classification suggests a close relationship with other legumes found in southern Africa. The species is also known to be part of the genus Palala, which is endemic to the region. The classification of Palala glabra highlights its unique position among other flowering plants.
